title: senecio eremophilus
intro: Senecio eremophilus, also known as Jericho Groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Australia. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio eremophilus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially exhibiting antiviral and antioxidant properties. Senecio eremophilus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
